days.title: Deep Learning Basics
resources: Deep Learning Book by Ian Goodfellow
CS231N: Convolutional Neural Networks for Visual Recognition
tasks: Implement a simple feedforward neural network
Solve a basic image classification problem using deep learning

days.title: Recurrent Neural Networks
resources: Speech Recognition with Deep Learning by Michael Auli
Long Short-Term Memory by Sepp Hochreiter, Jürgen Schmidhuber
tasks: Implement an LSTM network for text generation
Solve a time series prediction problem using RNNs

days.title: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN)
objectives: Learn transfer learning and data augmentation
resources: Deep Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng
Transfer Learning in Deep Convolutional Networks by Shan Chen, Ross Girshick, Kaiming He
tasks: Implement a CNN for object detection
Fine-tune a pre-trained model on a custom dataset

days.title: Reinforcement Learning
objectives: Understand Q-learning and policy gradient methods
Learn to implement an agent for a simple environment
resources: Reinforcement Learning: An Introduction by Richard S. Sutton, Andrew G. Barto
Deep Reinforcement Learning Hands-On by David Silver
tasks: Implement Q-learning for a gridworld problem
Train an agent to play Atari games using deep reinforcement learning

days.title: Deep Learning Project
objectives: Apply advanced machine learning techniques to a real-world problem
Evaluate and improve the performance of deep learning models
resources: Stanford CS224n: NLP with Deep Learning
tasks: Participate in a Kaggle competition using deep learning
Improve the accuracy of a pre-trained model on a custom dataset

notes.summary: Deep Learning is a branch of AI that uses artificial neural networks to learn patterns from data, widely used in image recognition, speech processing and natural language understanding. Neural networks have key components controlling data flow and learning, helping the model adjust parameters and improve predictions.
important_facts: Requires a large amount of data
study_tips: Explore different deep learning frameworks like TensorFlow and PyTorch
